title: soros #4673
definition:
1) an urn or receptacle for keeping the bones of the dead
 2) the funeral couch or bier on which the Jews carried their dead
    forth to burial
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) an urn or receptacle for keeping the bones of the dead
 2) the funeral couch or bier on which the Jews carried their dead
    forth to burial

    NASB:  a cinerary urn, by anal. a coffin:
